Author: Eauldane
Name: Snowcloak
Description: This plugin will synchronize your Penumbra mods and current Glamourer state with other paired clients automatically.
Changelog:
2.6.1
- Fixed regression with syncshell region detection.
- Removed our own changelog handler; we now use Dalamud's internal one.
2.6.0
- Updated to Dalamud API 15.
- Nameplates no longer colour with vanity colours, active pair colours, or Frostbrand availability during PvP.
- Sync data handoff has been reworked to be more reliable in very crowded areas.
- Lower-end systems can now request an alternative download compression format, with the server generating the needed variant automatically.
- Removed texture compression preferences; users now receive whichever version their pairs are wearing.
- Fixed an internal label leaking into a drawn label.
- Optimised internal dictionaries.
